SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday March 5, 2015 in Department 525:
Michelle Fernandez, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as propria Persona.
Wendy Huynh and Kwok Wah Chu, Appellants/Defendants appears as Propria Persona with witness Shun Yuni.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesse are sworn.
Michelle Fernandez testifies on her behalf.

Wendy Huynh testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit (A) 3 pictures.

Mr. Chu responds to questions from Judge Myles.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence from Defendent/Appellant retained by the Court.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.
